summary: Frontend testing complete for ProfileTab.js dark premium theme update. All 13 features verified working: profile page loads with dark gradient background, all form inputs use purple-tinted backgrounds and borders (rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.08) background, rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.3) borders), labels use text-purple-200/70, helper text uses text-purple-300/60, preview modal has gradient background with working Before/After tabs, Save button works correctly.
